generation_label: A nocturnal, bioluminescent botanical garden layout with flowing water and stone lantern highlights.
summary: A high-contrast exploration of a nocturnal garden where cold stone textures are punctured by ethereal, glowing botanical and aquatic life forms. The aesthetic balances architectural rigidity with fluid organic motion.
composition_principles: continuous flow lines via water ripples

route_a.objective: Establish a seamless, dense texture field of the garden floor and pond edge.
composition_rules: tiling stone textures with subtle moss overlays
interspersing glowing lotus buds at 15% density
rhythmic placement of bamboo segments to guide the eye
constraints: constant contrast ratio between stone and light
no large focal objects to allow for weapon-wide cropping

route_b.objective: Generate master compositions focusing on the interaction between the koi and the lantern light.
composition_rules: centralize the koi movement along the receiver curvature
anchor corners with heavy dark stone textures
use light scattering to bridge gaps between components
constraints: balanced distribution of small thematic clusters
avoidance of single large subjects spanning more than 40% of the canvas
enforce depth-of-field blurring on background elements

component_roles.stock: Dense stone texture with vertical bamboo silhouettes framing the rear.
component_roles.receiver: Primary pond scene; focus of koi motion and lotus bloom intensity.
component_roles.magazine: Submerged depths; darker, saturated blues with fading fish tails.
component_roles.pistol_grip: Solid wet flagstone transition, anchoring the piece.
component_roles.handguard: Trailing willow branches, blending into a fine, starry firefly mist.
component_roles.front_assembly: Soft atmospheric fade from indigo to void-black.
component_roles.barrel_muzzle: Quiet, minimal texture; simple dark slate gradient.

candidate_directions.title: Stone and Emissivity
candidate_directions.concept: Prioritizes the architectural stone lantern as the primary structural anchor for the lighting.
candidate_directions.route_a_emphasis: High density of stone cracks and moss.
candidate_directions.route_b_emphasis: Lantern light casts long, soft shadows across the receiver.

candidate_directions.title: Spectral Movement
candidate_directions.concept: Focuses on the fluid motion of koi across the weapon's curved geometry.
candidate_directions.route_a_emphasis: Overlapping ripple patterns for rhythmic flow.
candidate_directions.route_b_emphasis: Dynamic arcs of koi bodies following the magazine curve.

candidate_directions.title: Bamboo Verticality
candidate_directions.concept: Uses bamboo to create rhythmic, clean vertical lines that break the dark massing.
candidate_directions.route_a_emphasis: Strict vertical spacing to simulate a dense thicket.
candidate_directions.route_b_emphasis: Bamboo stalks acting as visual dividers for the koi scenes.

candidate_directions.title: Firefly Void
candidate_directions.concept: Deep focus on the darkness and the sparse, ethereal points of light.
candidate_directions.route_b_emphasis: Atmospheric fade-outs and negative space utilization.

evaluation_criteria: Clarity of the bioluminescent highlights against the dark slate background.
Natural transition of the koi's flowing form across the magazine curve.
Degree of 'night atmosphere' achieved through the lighting palette.
reference_policy: All visual references to botanical structures and traditional stone lanterns are derived from public domain nature photography and classical garden architecture, avoiding direct emulation of contemporary game artists.
